name: Ahmed Bilal
title: Senior Full Stack Engineer (JavaScript / TypeScript)
summary: Senior Full Stack Engineer with 5+ years of experience building scalable, high-performance fintech and AI applications. Strong expertise in Angular, React, Node.js, FastAPI, and microservices architecture, with proven success modernizing legacy systems, implementing real-time event-driven solutions, and improving developer productivity. Experienced in enterprise-grade environments, delivering secure and reliable applications with high test coverage, clean architecture, strong accessibility standards, and CI/CD-driven delivery.

contact.location: Islamabad Capital Territory, Pakistan (Open to Relocate)

experience.title: Senior Full Stack Engineer
responsibilities: Architect and deliver enterprise-grade frontend and full-stack solutions for regulated banking platforms.
Collaborate with product owners, UX designers, and backend engineers to design scalable, high-performance systems.
Build reusable components, shared services, and design-system assets to standardize implementation across products.
Implement dynamic forms, workflow orchestration, and secure API integrations for onboarding journeys.
Lead engineering standards through code reviews, mentorship, and architecture documentation.
Drive CI/CD and deployment reliability practices across development and release workflows.
achievements: Delivered scalable solutions across multiple banking platforms, improving team productivity by 30% through architectural and workflow enhancements.
Built and maintained design systems and reusable component libraries, improving development efficiency by 25% and ensuring cross-application consistency.
Implemented micro-frontend architecture, enabling independent feature development and faster deployments.
Developed server-side rendering (SSR) capabilities, improving performance and SEO.
Designed and implemented complex multi-step dynamic forms and workflow systems, streamlining customer onboarding processes.
Integrated RESTful APIs and optimized frontend-backend communication.
Replaced legacy bot-based workflows with real-time event-driven systems using message queues (Solace), enabling real-time account opening.
Led transition from monolithic architecture to microservices, improving scalability by 50%.
Developed backend microservices using Node.js and Express, with MongoDB change streams for real-time data synchronization.
Achieved 86%+ test coverage using Jest, significantly improving system reliability.
Reduced production bugs by 20% through stronger automated testing and quality controls.
Automated release pipelines, reducing release times by 40% and improving delivery consistency.
Mentored junior engineers and enforced clean code and architectural standards across the team.
Authored technical documentation for design systems, reducing onboarding time and improving collaboration across teams.
Improved usability and accessibility, reducing onboarding drop-off by 15% through ARIA-first and adaptive UI improvements.
Improved runtime performance using lazy loading, event delegation, and static analysis practices for large-scale applications.
Led frontend development for CIBC/Simplii Digital Core Banking platform with multi-step dynamic forms for account opening, mortgage onboarding, and AML/CAMLR compliance.
Developed real-time microservice processing dashboard for ASG – ISBO / Student Deposit Program using Solace and MongoDB Change Streams.
Architected complex, multi-step onboarding workflows leveraging Redux and RxJS orchestration, consistently maintaining Lighthouse performance scores above 95.
Engineered event-driven microservices utilizing Solace and Node.js, slashing backend processing latency by 50% and enabling highly-available real-time data streaming.
Bolstered platform reliability by driving test coverage to 86% and integrating automated end-to-end (E2E) testing pipelines into the CI/CD lifecycle.
Accelerated team velocity and productivity by 30% by establishing rigorous clean code standards and conducting comprehensive technical mentorship.

experience.title: Frontend Developer
responsibilities: Develop full-stack web features using Angular, Node.js, and Express.js for business-critical workflows.
Modernize legacy applications to newer Angular versions with improved stability and browser compatibility.
Build responsive, reusable, and accessibility-focused UI components in collaboration with design teams.
Participate in Agile rituals including sprint planning, backlog refinement, and cross-functional delivery alignment.
Apply static analysis and debugging practices to improve maintainability and resolve production issues.
Support engineering quality through testing practices and architecture-aligned refactoring.
achievements: Led migration from Angular 2+ to latest Angular versions, improving performance and system stability.
Implemented test-driven development (TDD) practices across frontend and backend.
Refactored legacy codebase following clean architecture (John Papa guidelines), improving performance by 25% and maintainability by 30%.
Developed full-stack features using Angular, Node.js, and Express.js.
Improved code quality through strong TypeScript adoption, reducing bugs and increasing maintainability.
Collaborated closely with design teams to deliver high-quality, user-focused UI/UX.
Migrated legacy applications to modern Angular versions, improving cross-browser compatibility and runtime performance.
Applied static code analysis and structured refactoring, improving maintainability by 25%.
Debugged and resolved production issues to improve overall application stability.
Orchestrated the end-to-end migration of a legacy platform to the newest Angular ecosystem, resulting in a 25-30% improvement in core web vitals and overall system stability.
Refactored the monolithic codebase following industry-standard scalable design patterns, significantly reducing technical debt and improving long-term maintainability.
Championed Test-Driven Development (TDD) by integrating Jest and Cypress, elevating deployment confidence and dramatically reducing production-level bugs.
Collaborated cross-functionally with UI/UX designers to translate complex Figma prototypes into highly responsive, accessibility-compliant user interfaces.

projects.name: AgentQA – Conversational AI QA Platform
projects.description: A full-stack, cloud-native QA platform engineering robust pipelines for the dynamic evaluation of LLMs and conversational AI.
achievements: Architected a distributed execution engine utilizing Node.js, Express, and Redis/BullMQ, scaling asynchronous LLM test resolution linearly across horizontal worker nodes.

Engineered comprehensive run orchestration pipelines with advanced queueing operations (prioritization, distributed locks, pause/resume/retry workflows)—capturing high-fidelity per-turn assertion outcomes.
Integrated dynamic Promptfoo YAML generation to automate programmatic evaluations and test authoring, persisting vast testing datasets to PostgreSQL.
Constructed a robust plugin ecosystem supporting custom network/HTTP/LLM providers—facilitating on-the-fly environment variable injection and per-run dataset imports.

projects.name: Design System Platform
projects.description: Enterprise-wide design system and component library platform for standardizing UI across multiple banking applications.
achievements: Built reusable UI components and comprehensive documentation for cross-team adoption.
Standardized UI across multiple enterprise applications, ensuring visual and functional consistency.
Improved developer onboarding and reduced code duplication across banking platforms.

projects.name: Microservices Transformation
projects.description: Large-scale migration from monolithic architecture to a distributed microservices-based system for improved scalability and resilience.
achievements: Migrated monolithic systems to distributed microservices architecture.
Enabled independent scaling and deployment of individual services.
Improved system resilience and fault isolation across the platform.

projects.name: Real-Time Event-Driven System
projects.description: Real-time event-driven processing system using messaging infrastructure and change data capture for financial workflows.
achievements: Implemented asynchronous messaging with Solace and MongoDB change streams for real-time data synchronization.
Enabled real-time workflows and async processing for banking operations.
Reduced latency and improved user experience for account opening and onboarding flows.

projects.name: Lucky Mobility Activation Widget
projects.description: A reusable React/TypeScript embeddable widget guiding customers through 6-7 step prepaid activation flows with bilingual support.
achievements: Delivered dynamic multi-step flows with Redux + RxJS epic architecture.
Implemented bilingual localization and host integration contract.
Built end-to-end local testing using Express mock API.

projects.name: FX Bot
projects.description: FastAPI for Microsoft Teams FX chatbot interactions, handling session state, multi-turn conversations, metadata extraction, and commentary blasts.
achievements: Implemented async state machine workflows for commentary blasts with draft handling and confirmation flows.
Managed session state and multi-turn conversation context.
Orchestrated scalable deployments with retries, logging, and error recovery.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
